_publications._publicationTitle: Autism Spectrum Disorder Symptom Profile Across the RASopathies.

_contextSnippet: Domain A: Mean Qualitative Abnormalities in Reciprocal Social Interaction (95% CI) 18.9 (18.7–19.1) 17.4(16.4–18.4) 18.4 (17.2–19.6) 0.743
details: Mean Domain A (Reciprocal Social Interaction) scores were 18.9 (95% CI: 18.7-19.1) in NF1+ASD, 17.4 (95% CI: 16.4-18.4) in NS+ASD, and 18.4 (95% CI: 17.2-19.6) in CFC+ASD (p=0.743)
